mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, username, password, role, profile_image, created_at, updated_at FROM member
SELECT id, name, email, username, password, role, profile_image, created_at, updated_at FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, email, username, password, role, profile_image, created_at, updated_at FROM member WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, name, email, username, password, role, profile_image, created_at, updated_at FROM member ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member(id, name, email, username, password, role, profile_image) VALUES(#{id}, #{name}, #{email}, #{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{profileImage})
